# 杨旺

发布时间：2025-11-18   点击量： 13568

![](https://kzgc.neuq.edu.cn/__local/C/00/22/A2524F054B5DE59438497F2B701_30CA50D5_10B77.jpg)

杨旺，男，1996年8月，工学博士，讲师

**联系方式**

电子邮箱：yangwang@neuq.edu.cn

联系电话：13081857409

**研究方向**

1.分布式协同控制

2.事件触发控制

3.容错控制

**教育背景**

2024.09-2025.08 韩国岭南大学 电气工程系，联合培养博士

2021.09-2025.10 东北大学 控制科学与工程，博士

2018.09-2021.07 东北大学 控制理论与控制工程，硕士

**工作履历**

2025.11-至今 东北大学秦皇岛分校

**学术兼职**

IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, ‌IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering‌, Nonlinear Dynamics等期刊审稿人

**学术成果**

研究成果发表在IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering等国际期刊

【代表性学术论文】

1.Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. A Modified Dynamic Event-Triggered Mechanism for Output Consensus of Heterogeneous MASs. IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, 2025, 55(1): 383 - 394.

2.Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang, Meng Fanwei, Ju H. Park. A Hybrid Triggering Consensus Framework to Nonlinear Multiagent Systems With Local Observer. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2025, early access, doi: 10.1109/TSMC.2025.3612577.

3.Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Distributed Adaptive Observer-Based Fault-Tolerant Output Consensus for Heterogeneous MASs. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2024, 54(4): 2414-2425.

4.Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Dynamic Surface Asymptotic Fault-Tolerant Control for Constrained Nonlinear Systems With Unknown Virtual Control Coefficients. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2024, 54(7): 3984-3993.

5.Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang,  Ju H. Park. Observer-Based Containment Control for Multiagent Systems by a Node-Based Hybrid Triggering Mechanism. IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2025, 22: 20249 - 20262.

6.Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Observer-Based Adaptive Consensus for Lipschitz Nonlinear Multiagent Systems via Asynchronous Event-Triggered Strategy. IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2025, 22: 2734-2745.

7.Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Data-Driven Learning for Resilient Synchronization and Parameter Estimation of Heterogeneous Nonlinear Multiagent Systems. IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2024, 21(4): 6992-7003.

8.Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Distributed fault-tolerant consensus for one-sided Lipschitz multiagent systems based on error decomposition and jointly observable condition. Information Sciences, 2024, 657: 119994.

9.Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang, Meng Fanwei. Dynamic edge event-triggered consensus for one-sided Lipschitz multiagent systems with disturbances. International Journal of Robust and Nonlinear Control, 2023, 33(10): 5305-5321.
